```
в”Ӯ  VideoCapture вҶ’ YOLOv11 вҶ’ ByteTrack вҶ’ Lane      в”Ӯ

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## Data Flow
1. **Capture**: Video source вҶ’ `CameraStreamReader` / `VideoFileReader` / `YouTubeLiveReader`
2. **Detect**: YOLO model (shared via `ModelRegistry` singleton) вҶ’ detections
3. **Track**: ByteTrack вҶ’ track IDs
4. **Assign**: Lane polygon containment вҶ’ lane ID
5. **Count**: Line crossing detection вҶ’ event
6. **Store**: Crop bytes encoded вҶ’ StorageWorker queue вҶ’ batch DB commit
7. **Serve**: REST API queries + WebSocket push + MJPEG stream

## Service Boundaries
| Service | Responsibility | Tech |
|---|---|---|
| AI Pipeline | Frame processing (detect, track, count) | Python, YOLO, ByteTrack |
| Backend API | HTTP endpoints, auth, rate limiting | FastAPI, SQLAlchemy |
| Frontend | Dashboard, live view, lane editor | HTML/JS, Streamlit |
| Storage Worker | Queue management, batch DB writes | Python threading |
| Redis | Live event pub/sub | redis-py |
| PostgreSQL | Event persistence, aggregation | SQLAlchemy, Alembic |
